author: ep0ch-nc
name: RPS
short: Slash-command Rock Paper Scissors with challenges and fake CPU.
description: Challenge a user or fake CPU opponent to RPS. Slash commands via hybrid, ephemeral pick replies. Tracks per-user stats.
install_msg: Loaded. Run `[p]slash enable rps && [p]slash enable rpsstats && [p]slash enable rpsreset && [p]slash sync` to register slash commands, then `/rps solo` for a test game.
end_user_data_statement: Stores per-user RPS win/loss/tie counts keyed by Discord user ID. Cleared via /rpsreset or Red's data deletion requests.
